AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING FOR MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-26-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED IS GRANTED WITH THE FOLLOWING PROVISO: DEFENDANT PURA B. TECH AKA PURA BALAGTAS SHALL HAVE TEN DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER TO FILE FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO DO SO ALL MATTERS COVERED BY THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED FOR ALL PURPOSES. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO HAVE MATTERS DEEMED ADMITTED IF DEFENDANT FAILS WITHIN 10 DAYS TO FILE FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSION
